items.title: Tesla Semi involved in first fatal crash, killing 2 in Nevada
items.body: A Tesla Semi was involved in its first known fatal crash, killing two people on U.S. 50 in Nevada on Sunday morning. The driver of the Class 8 electric truck reportedly fell asleep before rear-ending two passenger vehicl…
